small_talk: I'm doing well, thanks for asking!
All systems nominal on my end.
I'm here and ready to help.
Doing great! What can I do for you?
I'm good. Let's get things done.
clarification_prompts: I didn't quite catch that. Could you say it again?
Sorry, I missed that. One more time?
I couldn't make that out. Try again?
Hmm, I didn't get that. Could you rephrase?

morning: Good morning, {name}. Ready to start the day?
Rise and shine, {name}. How can I help?
Good morning! Let's make today productive, {name}.
afternoon: Good afternoon, {name}. What do you need?
Hey {name}, hope the day's going well. What's up?
Good afternoon! What can I do for you, {name}?
evening: Good evening, {name}. Winding down or still going?
Hey {name}, good evening. How can I help?
night: It's late, {name}. What do you need?
Night owl mode, {name}? What can I do?
Still up, {name}? I'm here if you need me.

unknown_app: I don't have {app} mapped yet. I can add it if you'd like.
Hmm, {app} isn't in my app list. Want me to remember it?
I'm not sure how to open {app}. Could you help me learn?
I don't recognize {app} as an application. Shall I add it?
fallback: I heard you, but I'm not sure how to process that yet.
I'm not quite sure what to do with that. Could you try rephrasing?
That's not something I know how to handle yet.
I didn't understand that command. Could you try again?
